title: 大阪杯の後に・Just a Dream...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Woo, Fine Motion!
Great job!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(It was just as fun as always, and everyone seems
happy.)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: What was up with Fine Motion?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? She was fantastic out there!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I mean, sure. But don't you think she was a little
different than at the Queen Elizabeth II Cup? Like
she didn't seem to be enjoying it like before.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She didn't seem quite like herself to me. Or
maybe it's just my imagination.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: About today... Were you feeling okay?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I guess it's nothing, then... I just thought
maybe there was something wrong.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Your smile seemed a bit... forced.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! It's none of my business! I'm sure it was just
my imagination.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...I guess you saw right through me, haha. I did
feel just a bit out of sorts.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So I was right! You shouldn't push yourself too
hard. Make sure you get plenty of rest today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to race you again when you're in peak
condition!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion's smile is strained after the race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: This is no good. I thought I'd be okay, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Do you mind if we go for a walk later?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Mmm... The sunset is so lovely. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The sunsets are very beautiful back in Ireland too.
I did so love watching them.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I always used to wonder—why does the sun
have to set? We could have much more fun if
night never came.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I always found it a bit sad... Not that I've ever
told that to anyone before.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's just like Shakur said. I'm not content with this
at all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've gone and done it... I let myself feel like I
didn't want things to end.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But this time of fun and happiness will be over
soon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Once I return home, my days here will become
distant memories, and... eventually, I'll forget
them.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My time here has been like a dream and, just like
any dream, it will eventually fade away...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Nothing will remain. It will be like it never
happened at all...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I just find that so awfully sad—so utterly
melancholic. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've begun to wish that I could stay here forever. I
want to continue racing long, long after I've
crossed my finish line.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Even though I know there's no such thing as
forever.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: PHEEEW!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I feel much better! I see—this is what Shakur
was talking about!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If I run while wishing that things won't end, it will
only make my legs grow heavy. I won't be able to
move forward.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I had to say it out loud and get it all
off my chest.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There are certain concessions required of my
heart... but a pillar of the people I shall become.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! What a weight off my shoulders! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile has changed from how it was only a
short time ago. It seems she really has moved past
her doubts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh! Now that I think about...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We still haven't discussed our next race.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If you have a plan, then I'd very much like to hear
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do have something in mind. Fine Motion is
tremendously popular right now, and there's a
race her fans no doubt hope she'll run in.
choice_data_list: Why don't we aim for the Takarazuka Kinen?
Why don't we aim for the Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Isn't that a Grand Prix? The fans decide who
can run...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'd be thrilled if I was able to join. I'll have to
smile with my entire heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that our next objective has been decided, I'd
like to try discussing her real feelings once more,
but...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Your Highness. Everyone is waiting
for you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Right. Let's begin making arrangements for
when I return home.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You can go ahead, Trainer. But let's ride the
bullet train back to the academy together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Do I have time to fix my makeup? Please forward
the documents to my phone...
choice_data_list: (Is this a look into her "normal" routine?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must have spent her whole life acclimating
her feelings to the reality of her situation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is this truly the best way she could be going
about it? By pushing any feeling of discontent to
the sidelines?
